trending_formats.description: Raw, handheld footage showing exhibition spaces being transformed from empty to immersive. Imperfect angles and natural lighting outperform polished content by 49%
trending_formats.example: Time-lapse of team setting up interactive displays with shaky camera work and real-time commentary

trending_formats.description: Authentic visitor reactions to experiential moments. TikTok engagement up 3.70% YoY, favoring genuine emotional responses
trending_formats.example: Split-screen showing visitor's face during first interaction with immersive tech installation

trending_formats.description: Real challenges and solutions during exhibition setup. Audiences crave relatable, imperfect content over polished presentations
trending_formats.example: Designer explaining how they solved lighting issues for interactive wall display in 60 seconds

trending_formats.description: Quick demos of touchpoints and interactive features. Short-form video consumption drives 24% more shares per post
trending_formats.example: 15-second loop showing motion-activated projection mapping responding to visitor movement

viral_patterns.description: Dramatic space transformations from concept to completion create shareable moments
viral_patterns.engagement_driver: Visual shock value and time investment showcase

viral_patterns.description: Following one person's complete experience through exhibition touchpoints
Showing how teams handle interactive tech failures in real-time

engagement_tactics: Use trending audio with exhibition visuals
Use location tags for venue discovery
Jump on trending sounds with exhibition content
Encourage user-generated content with branded hashtags

content_ideas.idea: POV: You're designing an immersive experience and everything goes wrong
content_ideas.hook: POV: The projection mapping crashes 2 hours before opening
content_ideas.why_it_works: Relatable behind-the-scenes content performs 22% better than polished presentations

content_ideas.hook: Rate this interactive wall installation setup (swipe for the reveal)
content_ideas.why_it_works: Interactive polls drive engagement, carousel format keeps users on platform longer

content_ideas.idea: Visitor tries to break our interactive display
content_ideas.hook: Watch this kid try to outsmart our motion sensors
content_ideas.why_it_works: Authentic visitor interactions create shareable moments and demonstrate durability

content_ideas.idea: Exhibition designer reacts to viral venue fails
content_ideas.hook: Exhibition designer reacts to this viral venue disaster
content_ideas.why_it_works: Reaction content leverages trending topics while showcasing expertise

content_ideas.idea: Time-lapse: Empty space to immersive experience in 60 seconds
content_ideas.hook: 48 hours of exhibition setup in 60 seconds
content_ideas.why_it_works: Transformation content drives high completion rates and saves

content_ideas.hook: Things you'll never hear an exhibition designer say
content_ideas.why_it_works: Industry insider humor creates community engagement and shares

content_ideas.idea: Interactive tech that actually works vs what clients expect
content_ideas.hook: Client expectations vs reality: Interactive exhibition edition
content_ideas.why_it_works: Expectation vs reality format drives comments and relatability

content_ideas.idea: Guess the exhibition budget based on these elements
content_ideas.hook: Guess how much this immersive experience cost to build
content_ideas.why_it_works: Guessing games drive comments and engagement, showcases value

content_ideas.idea: Exhibition fails that somehow became features
content_ideas.hook: When your exhibition 'mistake' becomes the most popular feature
content_ideas.why_it_works: Failure-to-success stories are highly shareable and humanize the brand

content_ideas.hook: When visitors find the secret interactive feature we didn't advertise
content_ideas.why_it_works: Discovery moments create FOMO and encourage repeat visits

optimal_posting.spacing_notes: Space Instagram posts 3-4 hours apart minimum. TikTok can handle closer spacing but avoid posting identical content types back-to-back

hashtag_strategy.strategy_notes: Mix 3-5 trending hashtags with 5-7 niche hashtags per post. Use branded hashtags consistently but sparingly. Research hashtag performance weekly and rotate based on engagement data
